prompt: Fuse the top mounting plate, the cylindrical sleeve below it, and the bottom 24 mm flange into a single solid via union. Verify the four M2.5 bolt holes pass cleanly through the plate and that the 22 mm pilot hole is concentric with the 5.5 mm coupler bore. The resulting STEP must contain exactly one solid. Do not change any dimensions.
original_source_code:
/*
Generated by Text-to-CAD:
A square mounting collar for a NEMA 11 stepper motor. Top face is a 28 mm × 28 mm square plate, 4 mm thick, with a 22 mm pilot hole on center and four M2.5 clearance holes on a 23 mm square bolt circle. Below the plate, a coaxial cylindrical sleeve of 16 mm outer diameter, 5.5 mm bore, 18 mm long, that envelopes a 5 mm × 5 mm jaw coupler (ST-FC01). The bottom of the sleeve has a 24 mm circular flange 3 mm thick that mates against the top of a 24 mm OD tube. Do NOT model the stepper motor itself. Do NOT add wires or screws.
*/
@settings(defaultLengthUnit = mm, kclVersion = 2.0)

plateSize = 28mm
plateThickness = 4mm
pilotDiameter = 22mm
boltPattern = 23mm
m25ClearanceDiameter = 2.9mm
sleeveOuterDiameter = 16mm
sleeveBoreDiameter = 5.5mm
sleeveLength = 18mm
bottomFlangeOuterDiameter = 24mm
bottomFlangeThickness = 3mm
sleeveFlangeOverlap = 0.05mm

plateHalfSize = plateSize / 2
boltPatternHalf = boltPattern / 2
plateCutterLength = plateThickness + 2mm
sleeveOuterRadius = sleeveOuterDiameter / 2
sleeveBoreRadius = sleeveBoreDiameter / 2
lowerBodyLength = sleeveLength + bottomFlangeThickness
boreCutterLength = lowerBodyLength + 1mm

plateProfile = sketch(on = XY) {
  bottomEdge = line(start = [var -14mm, var -14mm], end = [var 14mm, var -14mm])
  rightEdge = line(start = [var 14mm, var -14mm], end = [var 14mm, var 14mm])
  topEdge = line(start = [var 14mm, var 14mm], end = [var -14mm, var 14mm])
  leftEdge = line(start = [var -14mm, var 14mm], end = [var -14mm, var -14mm])

  coincident([bottomEdge.end, rightEdge.start])
  coincident([rightEdge.end, topEdge.start])
  coincident([topEdge.end, leftEdge.start])
  coincident([leftEdge.end, bottomEdge.start])
  horizontal(bottomEdge)
  vertical(rightEdge)
  horizontal(topEdge)
  vertical(leftEdge)
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, bottomEdge.start]) == -plateHalfSize
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, bottomEdge.start]) == -plateHalfSize
  horizontalDistance([bottomEdge.start, bottomEdge.end]) == plateSize
  verticalDistance([rightEdge.start, rightEdge.end]) == plateSize
}

plateBlank = extrude(region(point = [13mm, 0mm], sketch = plateProfile), length = plateThickness)
hiddenPlateProfile = hide(plateProfile)

plateCutSketch = sketch(on = offsetPlane(XY, offset = -1mm)) {
  pilotCircle = circle(start = [var 11mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  boltTopRight = circle(start = [var 12.95mm, var 11.5mm], center = [var 11.5mm, var 11.5mm])
  boltTopLeft = circle(start = [var -10.05mm, var 11.5mm], center = [var -11.5mm, var 11.5mm])
  boltBottomLeft = circle(start = [var -10.05mm, var -11.5mm], center = [var -11.5mm, var -11.5mm])
  boltBottomRight = circle(start = [var 12.95mm, var -11.5mm], center = [var 11.5mm, var -11.5mm])

  coincident([pilotCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  horizontal([pilotCircle.center, pilotCircle.start])
  diameter(pilotCircle) == pilotDiameter

  horizontal([
    boltTopRight.center,
    boltTopRight.start
  ])
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, boltTopRight.center]) == boltPatternHalf
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, boltTopRight.center]) == boltPatternHalf
  diameter(boltTopRight) == m25ClearanceDiameter

  horizontal([boltTopLeft.center, boltTopLeft.start])
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, boltTopLeft.center]) == -boltPatternHalf
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, boltTopLeft.center]) == boltPatternHalf
  diameter(boltTopLeft) == m25ClearanceDiameter

  horizontal([
    boltBottomLeft.center,
    boltBottomLeft.start
  ])
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, boltBottomLeft.center]) == -boltPatternHalf
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, boltBottomLeft.center]) == -boltPatternHalf
  diameter(boltBottomLeft) == m25ClearanceDiameter

  horizontal([
    boltBottomRight.center,
    boltBottomRight.start
  ])
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, boltBottomRight.center]) == boltPatternHalf
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, boltBottomRight.center]) == -boltPatternHalf
  diameter(boltBottomRight) == m25ClearanceDiameter
}

pilotCutter = extrude(region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = plateCutSketch), length = plateCutterLength, method = NEW)
boltTopRightCutter = extrude(region(point = [11.5mm, 11.5mm], sketch = plateCutSketch), length = plateCutterLength, method = NEW)
boltTopLeftCutter = extrude(region(point = [-11.5mm, 11.5mm], sketch = plateCutSketch), length = plateCutterLength, method = NEW)
boltBottomLeftCutter = extrude(region(point = [-11.5mm, -11.5mm], sketch = plateCutSketch), length = plateCutterLength, method = NEW)
boltBottomRightCutter = extrude(region(point = [11.5mm, -11.5mm], sketch = plateCutSketch), length = plateCutterLength, method = NEW)
hiddenPlateCutSketch = hide(plateCutSketch)

mountPlate = subtract(
  [plateBlank],
  tools = [
    pilotCutter,
    boltTopRightCutter,
    boltTopLeftCutter,
    boltBottomLeftCutter,
    boltBottomRightCutter
  ],
)
  |> appearance(color = "#9099a3", metalness = 70, roughness = 35)

sleeveOuterSketch = sketch(on = offsetPlane(XY, offset = -18.05mm)) {
  sleeveOuterCircle = circle(start = [var 8mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([sleeveOuterCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  horizontal([
    sleeveOuterCircle.center,
    sleeveOuterCircle.start
  ])
  diameter(sleeveOuterCircle) == sleeveOuterDiameter
}

sleeveOuterBlank = extrude(region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = sleeveOuterSketch), length = sleeveLength + sleeveFlangeOverlap, method = NEW)
hiddenSleeveOuterSketch = hide(sleeveOuterSketch)

bottomFlangeSketch = sketch(on = offsetPlane(XY, offset = -21mm)) {
  flangeOuterCircle = circle(start = [var 12mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([flangeOuterCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  horizontal([
    flangeOuterCircle.center,
    flangeOuterCircle.start
  ])
  diameter(flangeOuterCircle) == bottomFlangeOuterDiameter
}

bottomFlangeBlank = extrude(region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = bottomFlangeSketch), length = bottomFlangeThickness, method = NEW)
hiddenBottomFlangeSketch = hide(bottomFlangeSketch)

lowerBlank = union([sleeveOuterBlank, bottomFlangeBlank])

boreCutSketch = sketch(on = offsetPlane(XY, offset = -21.5mm)) {
  boreCircle = circle(start = [var 2.75mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([boreCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  horizontal([boreCircle.center, boreCircle.start])
  diameter(boreCircle) == sleeveBoreDiameter
}

boreCutter = extrude(region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = boreCutSketch), length = boreCutterLength, method = NEW)
hiddenBoreCutSketch = hide(boreCutSketch)

sleeveFlange = subtract(lowerBlank, tools = [boreCutter])
  |> appearance(color = "#9099a3", metalness = 70, roughness = 35)

source_ranges.prompt: Fuse the top mounting plate, the cylindrical sleeve below it, and the bottom 24 mm flange into a single solid via union. Verify the four M2.5 bolt holes pass cleanly through the plate and that the 22 mm pilot hole is concentric with the 5.5 mm coupler bore. The resulting STEP must contain exactly one solid. Do not change any dimensions.
